title: In-Flight Promise Deduplication, Waiters, Abort Ownership, and Cleanup · Contract Lens: Pokedex Ts Dedup Schedule Tests
summary: Concurrent misses create duplicate fetches, a shared promise retains one caller signal, first cancellation rejects all waiters, and settled entries remain in the in-flight map. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts dedup schedule tests increment in waiter-aware duplicate-suppressed async loader. Learners progress through predic…
objectives: Control settlement order and assert fetch count, waiter outcomes, abort reasons, cleanup, cache publication, and no dangling listeners.
Remove settled in-flight entries on success, validation failure, network failure, timeout, and abort without unhandled rejection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
